Explanation: The Spring 2013 newsletter of the East Carolina University (ECU) Department of Management ([69687]) confirms that Dr. Kenneth Bass and Dr. Roy Simerly retired together after a combined 44 years at ECU, matching the scenario described. Dr. Bass earned his PhD from Louisiana Tech University (a Land-Grant Institution) in 1991, during the only term of Republican President George H.W. Bush, and had a career before academia, which fits the clues. The timing of their retirement aligns with Barack Obama’s second term as President. No other candidates fit all clues as precisely as Dr. Bass.
Exact Answer: Bass
Confidence: 98%
